title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c: no SenML usage after include; storage still raw bytes instead of SenML pack for DTN
description: SenML header included but senml_encode_* never called. Per coap_location.c and spec, payloads must be SenML CBOR for interoperability. Add encode for message string value. P1. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zt3c.18.1
